MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Frannie S. Mok, Esq. of L/O of Frannie Mok, Tel. 510.832.2882, for Cross-Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT WEN MEI'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE CROSS COMPLAINT is Granted with leave to amend because no opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ZHI ZHENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled in its entirety. Although the moving party purports to demurrer to six causes of action, argument is provided only as to the first cause of action. The first cause of action is adequately pled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Continued To Jun-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ZHI ZHENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to June 20, 2012 because the court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm on June 11, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has received courtesy copies of the moving papers. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
